description: Restricted contexts MUST NOT appear in search results for unauthorized requesters AND MUST NOT count toward total_estimate. The count itself leaks existence; both 'matches' and 'total_estimate' MUST be scoped by visibility.

scenarios.name: Authorized requester (in audience) sees both contexts
Unauthorized requester sees only the public context
scenarios.notes: MUST be matches_count=1 AND total_estimate=1. Including the restricted context in total_estimate (even without listing it in matches) leaks its existence to the unauthorized requester. Registry MUST scope BOTH the matches array AND the total_estimate count.

scenarios.name: Anonymous requester (registry advertises anonymous_public_reads=true)
scenarios.notes: Anonymous requesters see only public contexts. Same scoping rule as authenticated unauthorized requesters.

scenarios.name: Anonymous requester (registry does not advertise anonymous_public_reads)
scenarios.notes: Registry that does not advertise anonymous_public_reads MUST reject anonymous requests outright (RFC-ACDP-0008 §6.3).
